Contains.description: Check if item exist in an array

tags.summary: Check if item exist in an array

Create.description:
Create a new array
Any input update will recreate the array
Reusing the outputted array is more recommended than recreate the array

'0'.description:
You can right click this port to create a new port
Delete every input port if you want to create empty object

Array.description: Array will be recreated everytime input was changed

IndexOf.description: Find item index from an array

tags.summary: Find item index from an array

Insert.description: Insert item on array at index

tags.summary: Insert item on array at index

Pop.description:
Get the last value of an array and remove it from the array
Make sure to use route cable when using this to avoid logic error

tags.summary: Get last value and remove it

Push.description:
Add data to an array, the data will be placed on last index
Make sure to use route cable when using this to avoid logic error

RemoveAt.description: Remove items start from an index from an array

Shift.description:
Get the first value of an array and remove it from the array
Make sure to use route cable when using this to avoid logic error

tags.summary: Get first value and remove it

Unshift.description:
Add data to an array, the data will be inserted from first index
Make sure to use route cable when using this to avoid logic error

Invert.description:
Invert `true` to `false` and vice-versa
This just like `let NewValue = !Value;`

And.description:
Compare boolean with AND
This will only return `true` if both input is `true`

Or.description:
Compare boolean with OR
This will only return `true` if one of the input is `true`

Xor.description:
Compare boolean with XOR
This will only return `true` if the input is not similar

Route.description: Route to other node if the input receive `true` value

Trigger.description: Trigger a function call if the input receive `true` value

Has.description: Check if Map has an key

tags.summary: Check if Map has an key

Modulo.description: Return the remaining of divided number with modulo (A % B)

PowerOf.description: Returns the value of A to the power of B.

And.description: Apply bitwise AND operator on number (A & B)

Or.description: Apply bitwise OR operator on number (A | B)

ShiftLeft.description:
The left shift operator (<<) shifts the first operand the specified number of bits, modulo 32, to the left.
Excess bits shifted off to the left are discarded. Zero bits are shifted in from the right.

ShiftRight.description:
Shift bits of a number from left to the right, modulo 32.
Excess bits shifted off to the right are discarded.

Xor.description: Apply bitwise XOR operator on number (A ^ B)

Equal.description: Compare and return true if both value is similar

LessThanOrEqual.description: Return true if A is less than or equal with B (A <= B)

LessThan.description: Return true if A is less than with B (A < B)

MoreThanOrEqual.description: Return true if A is more than or equal with B (A >= B)

MoreThan.description: Return true if A is more than with B (A > B)

NotEqual.description: Compare and return true if both value is not similar

Fixed.description:
Return fixed number of a number with specified precision
Example: 0.123456 => 0.12 (Precision: 2)

String.description:
Convert number into string type
Radix (Optional):
2: Binary string
16: Hex string

Create.description:
Create a new object
Any input update will recreate the object
Reusing the outputted object is more recommended than recreate the object

key.description:
You can right click this port to create or rename new port
Delete every input port if you want to create empty object

Object.description: Object will be recreated everytime input was changed

Deconstructor.description:
Deconstruct an output port's structure
This also known as object destructuring in JavaScript
Or extract property for an object that have structured

Keys.description: Extract object keys or property name as an array

Value.description: Transverse a object with specified property to get its value inside

Values.description: Extract object values as an array

CharAt.description: Get char from a string at index

CodePointAt.description: Get char point from a string at index

EndsWith.description:
Return true if the string have a specified
string at the ends of the string

Includes.description: Return true if a string contains the specified string

IndexOf.description:
Return index of specified string on a string
This will return -1 if not exist

LastIndexOf.description:
Return the last index of specified string on a string
This will return -1 if not exist

Replace.description:
Find a string (needle) from a string (haystack)
with a string (replacement)

Search.description: Find index from a string with RegExp

Split.description: Split a string and return an array

StartsWith.description:
Return true if the string have a specified
string at the beginning of the string

Trim.description: Trim white space from a string at the start and end of string

Equal.description: Return true if both value is similar

NotEqual.description: Return true if both value is not similar

End.description:
Fill string with string (padding) on right (end)
if the text is less than specified length

Start.description:
Fill string with string (padding) on left (starts)
if the text is less than specified length

Number.description:
Convert string to number
This may error if the string couldn't be converted to number
For example if it's get NaN

Trigger.description: Trigger a function call on any data changes

Callback.description: Route to other node if the input receive `true` value

Trigger.description:
Trigger function call if data flow's route
was reaching to this node
